name: Carrot Cake Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Mix crumbs, sugar, cinnamon, and butter. Press into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake for 10 minutes.
3. Increase oven temperature to 450°F.
4. Beat 2 ½ packages cream cheese with sugar and 1/4 cup flour until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Blend in orange juice.
5. Add the remaining flour, carrots, raisins, and spices, and mix well. Pour over crust.
6. Bake for 10 minutes, then reduce oven temperature to 250°F and continue baking for 55 minutes.
7. Turn off oven. Let cheesecake cool completely inside the cooling oven for one hour.
8. Loosen cake from rim of pan. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
9. Beat remaining cream cheese with orange juice until well blended. Gradually add powdered sugar, mixing until well blended. Spread over top of cheesecake.
10. Garnish with additional raisins and orange zest or shredded carrot, if desired.
